name: assembly-d1-lipschitz
description: Wave 3 Phase 5c — D1 directional Lipschitz on the Mechanical Assembly scene. Exercises D1's per-direction step-size scaling on the geometry where it should show the most visible benefit: thin-feature CSG edges + difference operations where the SDF gradient varies sharply by direction. The 8-field hybrid tape+atlas scene combines smooth + sharp surfaces; D1 should produce near-identical pixels to the pre-D1 baseline (`assembly-default`) while internally taking tighter step sizes through the high-curvature regions. Pixel-diff baselines approved on first run; tolerance allows slight variation from improved step convergence.
